query: Pod `Pending`，events 里 `FailedScheduling`：`Insufficient cpu/memory`、`node(s) had taint`、`didn't match node selector/affinity`。。在 K8s 里怎么排查？优先看哪些 kubectl 命令/事件/日志
Pod `CreateContainerConfigError`，events 提示 missing Secret/ConfigMap 或 key not found。。在 K8s 里怎么排查？优先看哪些 kubectl 命令/事件/日志
Pod Running 但 Ready=false，events 显示 `Readiness probe failed`，服务 endpoints 可能为空导致 Ingress/Service 返回 5xx。。在 K8s 里怎么排查？优先看哪些 kubectl 命令/事件/日志
Pod 状态 `CrashLoopBackOff`，`RESTARTS` 持续增加，events 常见 `Back-off restarting failed container`。。在 K8s 里怎么排查？优先看哪些 kubectl 命令/事件/日志
应用访问 DB/Redis/API 超时，只有部分 namespace 受影响；DNS 正常不代表业务端口放通。。在 K8s 里怎么排查？优先看哪些 kubectl 命令/事件/日志
延迟/p99 升高，但 `kubectl top pod` 看起来 CPU 不高；Prometheus 指标 `container_cpu_cfs_throttled_seconds_total` 很高。。在 K8s 里怎么排查？优先看哪些 kubectl 命令/事件/日志
目标：先判断影响面（单 Pod/单节点/全局），再抓证据（events/logs/版本变更），避免重启/驱逐导致线索丢失。在 K8s 里怎么排查？优先看哪些 kubectl 命令/事件/日志
`kubectl get nodes` 显示 NotReady；Pod 被驱逐（evicted）；事件 `NodeNotReady`。。在 K8s 里怎么排查？优先看哪些 kubectl 命令/事件/日志
当前日志：`kubectl logs <pod> -n <ns> -c <container> --tail=200`。在 K8s 里怎么排查？优先看哪些 kubectl 命令/事件/日志
Pod 长时间处于 Terminating；可能有 finalizers；如果节点不可达，kubelet 无法完成清理。。在 K8s 里怎么排查？优先看哪些 kubectl 命令/事件/日志
Pod 重启，describe 里 `Last State: Terminated Reason: OOMKilled`；日志可能戛然而止；节点可能有 `Killed process ... out of memory`。。在 K8s 里怎么排查？优先看哪些 kubectl 命令/事件/日志
Pod 一直 Pending，events 里有 `ImagePullBackOff`、`ErrImagePull`、`TLS handshake timeout`、`401 Unauthorized`、`no such host`。。在 K8s 里怎么排查？优先看哪些 kubectl 命令/事件/日志
在 Pod 内 `curl http://service:port` 正常，但外部经 Ingress 返回 `502/504` 或 `connection refused`。。在 K8s 里怎么排查？优先看哪些 kubectl 命令/事件/日志
应用日志报 `no such host`、`NXDOMAIN`、`SERVFAIL`，解析 `kubernetes.default` 或 Service FQDN 失败。。在 K8s 里怎么排查？优先看哪些 kubectl 命令/事件/日志
容器频繁重启，events `Liveness probe failed`；在下游故障时尤其明显。。在 K8s 里怎么排查？优先看哪些 kubectl 命令/事件/日志
pod stays in `Terminating` for a long time, finalizers present, API delete returns but object remains.. In Kubernetes, what are the first troubleshooting steps and kubectl commands?
Use `kubectl describe` to see events and current spec: `kubectl describe pod <pod> -n <ns>`. In Kubernetes, what are the first troubleshooting steps and kubectl commands?
controllers or jobs log `Forbidden: User ... cannot ...`, kubectl with SA token fails.. In Kubernetes, what are the first troubleshooting steps and kubectl commands?
`kubectl get nodes` shows `NotReady`, pods get evicted, events mention `NodeNotReady`.. In Kubernetes, what are the first troubleshooting steps and kubectl commands?
frequent restarts, events show `Liveness probe failed`, container killed even though it could recover.. In Kubernetes, what are the first troubleshooting steps and kubectl commands?
Pod shows `CrashLoopBackOff`, `RESTARTS` increasing, events contain `Back-off restarting failed container`.. In Kubernetes, what are the first troubleshooting steps and kubectl commands?
Pod stays `CreateContainerConfigError`, events mention missing Secret/ConfigMap key.. In Kubernetes, what are the first troubleshooting steps and kubectl commands?
node condition `DiskPressure=True`, pods evicted, image pulls fail, kubelet logs `no space left on device`.. In Kubernetes, what are the first troubleshooting steps and kubectl commands?
node DNS cannot resolve registry domain, often CoreDNS/upstream DNS or node resolv.conf issues.. In Kubernetes, what are the first troubleshooting steps and kubectl commands?
Current logs: `kubectl logs <pod> -n <ns> -c <container> --tail=200`. In Kubernetes, what are the first troubleshooting steps and kubectl commands?
p99 latency spikes, `kubectl top pod` shows modest CPU, but metrics show high throttling.. In Kubernetes, what are the first troubleshooting steps and kubectl commands?
`kubectl` slow, controllers lag, events delayed, errors `context deadline exceeded`.. In Kubernetes, what are the first troubleshooting steps and kubectl commands?
What it means: desired != available replicas, rollout stuck. In Kubernetes, what are the first troubleshooting steps and kubectl commands?
pod events: `MountVolume.SetUp failed`, `AttachVolume.Attach failed`, CSI errors.. In Kubernetes, what are the first troubleshooting steps and kubectl commands?
`FailedScheduling`: scheduler cannot place pod (resources/taints/affinity/quota). In Kubernetes, what are the first troubleshooting steps and kubectl commands?
Pod 状态 `CrashLoopBackOff`，`RESTARTS` 持续增加，events 常见 `Back-off restarting failed container`。，怎么排查？ CrashLoopBackOff Pod RESTARTS events
Pod Running 但 Ready=false，events 显示 `Readiness probe failed`，服务 endpoints 可能为空导致 Ingress/Service 返回 5xx。，怎么排查？ Readiness probe failed Ready
Use `kubectl describe` to see events and current spec: `kubectl describe pod <pod> -n <ns>`，怎么排查？ Command Cheatsheet Describe Events
Symptoms: Pod shows `CrashLoopBackOff`, `RESTARTS` increasing, events contain `Back-off restarting failed container`，怎么排查？ Incident CrashLoopBackOff app exits
延迟/p99 升高，但 `kubectl top pod` 看起来 CPU 不高；Prometheus 指标 `container_cpu_cfs_throttled_seconds_total` 很高。，怎么排查？ CPU Throttling p99 kubectl
Symptoms: pod stays in `Terminating` for a long time, finalizers present, API delete returns but object remains，怎么排查？ Incident Pod stuck Terminating
Symptoms: node condition `DiskPressure=True`, pods evicted, image pulls fail, kubelet logs `no space left on device`，怎么排查？ Incident DiskPressure node filesystem
Symptoms: `kubectl get nodes` shows `NotReady`, pods get evicted, events mention `NodeNotReady`，怎么排查？ Incident NodeNotReady Symptoms kubectl
应用访问 DB/Redis/API 超时，只有部分 namespace 受影响；DNS 正常不代表业务端口放通。，怎么排查？ NetworkPolicy DNS DB/Redis/API namespace
Symptoms: frequent restarts, events show `Liveness probe failed`, container killed even though it could recover，怎么排查？ Incident Liveness probe failed
目标：先判断影响面（单 Pod/单节点/全局），再抓证据（events/logs/版本变更），避免重启/驱逐导致线索丢失，怎么排查？ Pod/ events/logs/ kubectl get
Symptoms: Pod stays `CreateContainerConfigError`, events mention missing Secret/ConfigMap key，怎么排查？ Incident CreateContainerConfigError bad env/secret/configmap
Symptoms: controllers or jobs log `Forbidden: User，怎么排查？ Incident RBAC denies access
Pod `CreateContainerConfigError`，events 提示 missing Secret/ConfigMap 或 key not found。，怎么排查？ CreateContainerConfigError Pod events missing
Pod `Pending`，events 里 `FailedScheduling`：`Insufficient cpu/memory`、`node(s) had taint`、`didn't match node selector/affinity`。，怎么排查？ FailedScheduling Pending Pod events
